## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly team stand-up to discuss content production processes, resource allocation, and quality improvement strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/TTyhTV6dsBx1xrX_pmad7SHud2kLwUa7?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Team needs to focus on training writers rather than editing content themselves to improve scalability](https://fathom.video/share/TTyhTV6dsBx1xrX_pmad7SHud2kLwUa7?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Account managers should select 4-5 dedicated writers per client to ensure consistency and quality](https://fathom.video/share/TTyhTV6dsBx1xrX_pmad7SHud2kLwUa7?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
  - [Improved workflows and standardized checklists are needed to streamline onboarding and training of writers](https://fathom.video/share/TTyhTV6dsBx1xrX_pmad7SHud2kLwUa7?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Client reporting needs enhancement with more visual, narrative-driven summaries highlighting key metrics and progress](https://fathom.video/share/TTyhTV6dsBx1xrX_pmad7SHud2kLwUa7?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Production Challenges

  - [Some team members spending too much time editing content themselves instead of training writers](https://fathom.video/share/TTyhTV6dsBx1xrX_pmad7SHud2kLwUa7?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [Concerns raised about content quality and meeting client expectations, especially for critical clients](https://fathom.video/share/TTyhTV6dsBx1xrX_pmad7SHud2kLwUa7?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
  - [Difficulty managing high volume of articles (40+ per week) across multiple accounts](https://fathom.video/share/TTyhTV6dsBx1xrX_pmad7SHud2kLwUa7?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)

### Writer Management and Training

  - [Account managers encouraged to select 4-5 dedicated writers per client from available pool](https://fathom.video/share/TTyhTV6dsBx1xrX_pmad7SHud2kLwUa7?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
  - [Need for standardized basic training and checklists for all writers to ensure consistency](https://fathom.video/share/TTyhTV6dsBx1xrX_pmad7SHud2kLwUa7?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Importance of writers being familiar with specific client needs and industries](https://fathom.video/share/TTyhTV6dsBx1xrX_pmad7SHud2kLwUa7?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)

### Workflow Improvements

  - [Daniel working on enhancing AI workflows, but team needs more visibility on progress](https://fathom.video/share/TTyhTV6dsBx1xrX_pmad7SHud2kLwUa7?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [Suggestion to create centralized full-time content team (5-6 people) for core writing needs](https://fathom.video/share/TTyhTV6dsBx1xrX_pmad7SHud2kLwUa7?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
  - [Discussion of balancing AI-generated content with human editing for optimal quality and efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/TTyhTV6dsBx1xrX_pmad7SHud2kLwUa7?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

### Client Reporting Enhancements

  - [Need for more visually appealing, narrative-driven reports (e.g. PPT templates)](https://fathom.video/share/TTyhTV6dsBx1xrX_pmad7SHud2kLwUa7?tab=summary&timestamp=3026.0)
  - [Importance of summarizing key metrics, progress, and storytelling for senior client stakeholders](https://fathom.video/share/TTyhTV6dsBx1xrX_pmad7SHud2kLwUa7?tab=summary&timestamp=3103.0)
  - [Suggestion to include week-over-week comparisons and growth percentages in reports](https://fathom.video/share/TTyhTV6dsBx1xrX_pmad7SHud2kLwUa7?tab=summary&timestamp=3225.0)

### Resource Allocation

  - [Team members (especially part-time) seeking clarity on expected workload and account management responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/TTyhTV6dsBx1xrX_pmad7SHud2kLwUa7?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
  - [Discussion of transitioning to full-time roles and managing 4+ client accounts each](https://fathom.video/share/TTyhTV6dsBx1xrX_pmad7SHud2kLwUa7?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [Jimmy offering to hire additional resources (writers, editors) as needed to support team](https://fathom.video/share/TTyhTV6dsBx1xrX_pmad7SHud2kLwUa7?tab=summary&timestamp=2297.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andre and Prateek to arrange writer training sessions, with Sami invited to join](https://fathom.video/share/TTyhTV6dsBx1xrX_pmad7SHud2kLwUa7?tab=summary&timestamp=2773.0)
  - [Team members to select dedicated writers for their accounts and begin focused training](https://fathom.video/share/TTyhTV6dsBx1xrX_pmad7SHud2kLwUa7?tab=summary&timestamp=2300.0)
  - [Everyone to ensure they're fully trained on Airtable and AI workflows (AirOps)](https://fathom.video/share/TTyhTV6dsBx1xrX_pmad7SHud2kLwUa7?tab=summary&timestamp=2786.0)
  - [Daniel to provide more frequent updates on AI workflow improvements](https://fathom.video/share/TTyhTV6dsBx1xrX_pmad7SHud2kLwUa7?tab=summary&timestamp=2894.0)
  - [Account managers to enhance client reporting with visual summaries and narrative-driven updates](https://fathom.video/share/TTyhTV6dsBx1xrX_pmad7SHud2kLwUa7?tab=summary&timestamp=3026.0)
  - [Team to hold each other accountable for implementing agreed-upon process improvements](https://fathom.video/share/TTyhTV6dsBx1xrX_pmad7SHud2kLwUa7?tab=summary&timestamp=2932.0)
